code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(input)
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if not list.contains(nums, v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if not list.contains(nums, v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let total = nums.len()
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut used: List<Int> = []
mut picked = 0
while picked < total
  mut min_val = 0
  mut min_idx = -1
  mut j = 0
  while j < total
    if not list.contains(used, j)
      match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if min_idx == -1
          min_val = v
          min_idx = j
        else if v < min_val
          min_val = v
          min_idx = j
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
  used = list.push(used, min_idx)
  picked = picked + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut k = 0
let m = sorted.len()
while k < m
  match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(output)
